title: Remove redundant SIMD store address recomputation
methodology: Removed the redundant ALU bundle that recomputed tmp_addr1/tmp_addr2 before each vector vstore. The vector path already computed those addresses for the matching vload and never overwrote them, so the stores can reuse the original pointers directly.
motivation: Building on exp-003-vectorize-the-batch-loop-with-8-lane-sim; the brief suggested memory optimization and combining successful elements, and the current best still spent one extra bundle per SIMD chunk on address recomputation.
